## How tested

<!-- Commands run / manual steps. -->

- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm exec tsc -b`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `cargo test -p keylayout-core -p keymano-session`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Verified in `pnpm dev` and/or `pnpm tauri dev`
